title: johnstonia axilliflora
intro: Johnstonia axilliflora, also known as Johnston's milkwort, is a species of flowering plant in the gentian family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and skin conditions. The plant's roots and leaves contain compounds with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Johnstonia axilliflora can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, and has been used to support overall health and well-being.
